### Gang: Ash Waste Nomads

* **Summoning.** At the start of each battle, roll a number of D6s equal to the number of your Elite models participating. Set those dice aside, keeping their results. As an Action with no Success Roll, your Elite models can spend one of these dice to summon a creature to aid them. The benefit depends on the result showing on the spent die:  
  * **1: Styr'ghar.** Remove the model from the table, then place it on the table anywhere that is 12” or further from enemy models.  
  * **2: Dae'ghar.** Until the end of the current Turn, enemies treat the ground within 5” of the model as Dangerous Terrain.  
  * **3: Tyr.** Each enemy within 3” of the model when summoned cannot make attacks against enemies that Retreat from them, and they have \-1 DICE to hit with all attacks, each until the end of the current Turn.  
  * **4: Char'ghar.** This model’s attacks have FIRE during this Activation.  
  * **5: Vau'ghar.** This model or any one other chosen ally can make an additional attack the next time it takes the Fight Action this Turn.  
  * **6: Myr'ghar.** This model’s melee attacks ignore Armour during this Activation.  
* **Leader.** Your Gang Leader is known as a Chieftain and gains the following ability:  
  * **Swift.** The Chieftain’s movement speed is increased by 1”.  
* **Champions.** Each of your Champions is either a Watcher or Stormcaller, gaining the corresponding ability below:  
  * **Watcher: Accurate.** The Watcher has an additional \+1 to its Ranged skill, for a total of \+2.  
  * **Stormcaller (LIMIT: 1):** **Call the Storm.** Ranged attacks made against the Stormcaller or any of its allies within 6” of it have \-1 DICE.  
* **Gangers.** Your Gangers are known as Warriors. When promoted to Elite, the Ganger gains either the Watcher or Stormcaller ability listed for Champions above.  
* **Juves.** You Juves are known as Scouts. Up to two of them can be upgraded to Dust Runners for a cost of \+5 credits each. If they are upgraded to a Ganger later, they retain this upgrade, including its cost and limits.  
  * **Dust Runner:** **Swift.** The Dust Runner’s movement speed is increased by 2”.  
* **Beast Riders.** You cannot purchase any Ridgerunners.  
* **Ash Waste Chems.** You cannot purchase any Chem Equipment from the Necromunda Gang Shared Armoury.

#### Ash Waste Nomads Unique Battlekit

* **Ash Cloak.** The wearer has NEGATE FIRE and NEGATE GAS.  
* **Ash Orchid Venom (CONSUMABLE).** The model has REGENERATE 1, but has \-1 DICE to all Success Rolls besides attacks.  
* **Blast Carbine.** 18”, ASSAULT, CRITICAL  
* **Blast Rifle.** 24”, CRITICAL  
* **Bone Talons.** Melee, CLEAVE 2, VISCIOUS 11, TWO-HANDED, Cumbersome  
* **Dustback Halamite.** The equipped model is mounted on a Dustback. The rider gains the LARGE Keyword if it is not already LARGE, as well as the BEAST Keyword, and a movement speed of 10”/Infantry, but has only one hand to carry other weapons, though it can hold two-handed weapons with Shield Combo. It also has the Mighty Leap ability.  
  * **Mighty Leap.** The rider has \+2 DICE to all Jump Success Rolls, and it does not suffer Injury rolls due to falling during its Activation. It also has \+1 DICE to Diving Charge Success Rolls and does not fall Down or suffer an Injury roll due to failing a Diving Charge.  
* **Duststalker’s Mandible (CONSUMABLE).** The model ignores the STEALTH Keyword and has IGNORE COVER and RISKY with its ranged attacks, and whenever it suffers any STUN MARKERS, it suffers 1 additional STUN MARKER.  
* **Insective Knife.** Melee, GAS, MAIN HAND ONLY  
* **Milk of the Harpy (CONSUMABLE).** The model gains \+2” movement speed, but if it does not end its Activation at least 5” away from where it began that Activation, it suffers 1 BLOOD MARKER.  
* **Sky Mantle.** The wearer gains the STEALTH keyword.  
* **Tears of the Storm (CONSUMABLE).** Once during each of its Activations, the model can make an additional attack when it takes the Shoot ot Fight Action, but when it is Activated, if it is more than 1” from any enemy models the first ACTION that it takes must take a Dash ACTION, even if another rule states that it cannot take a Dash ACTION. In addition, the first 3” of this move must be in a straight line directly away from its starting position, if it is possible for it to do so. If the model is Down at the start of the Activation, it will stand up if it can do so and must then attempt to move 3” in a straight line away from its starting position.  
* **Venom Caster.** 8”, \-1 INJURY DICE, GAS, FLAMETHROWER, IGNORE ARMOUR, TWO-HANDED  
* **Venom Sacs.** This model’s attacks with GAS have \+1 INJURY DICE and RISKY.  
* **Venom Stave.** Melee, BLOCK, GAS, TWO-HANDED, Shield Combo

The Arthromite Duneskuttler is equipped with Heavy Carapace and Mandibles, included in its cost and statistics above. It cannot be equipped with any other weapons, armour, or equipment.

* **Mandibles.** Melee, CLEAVE 2, \+1 INJURY DICE

**Abilities**

* **Cling.** The Arthromite Duneskuttler does not need to make a Success Roll to Climb.

BEAST, FEAR, LARGE, NO PROMOTION, TOUGH

#### 0-2 Ashwing Helamite (Cost: 85 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Ashwing Helamite | 10”/Flying | N/A | \+1 | \-1 | 60 x 35mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Ashwing Helamite is equipped with Light Carapace and its Stinger, included in its cost and statistics above. It cannot be equipped with any other weapons, armour, or equipment.

* **Stinger.** Melee, CRITICAL, GAS, ARMOUR PIERCING 1

**Abilities**

* **Handled.** Select one GANGER model in your Warband at the start of the battle. That model is the Ashwing Helamite’s handler. Once per battle, as an Action with no Success Roll, the handler can place a Lure Marker within 1” of itself.  
* **Territorial.** The Ashwing Helamite cannot be deployed normally, and must be deployed using its DEEP STRIKE Keyword. It can only be deployed fully within 3” of its handler’s Lure Marker, but can be deployed regardless of enemy models.

**Keywords**  
BEAST, DEEP STRIKE, FLYING, LARGE, NO PROMOTION

The Arthromite Spinewyrm is equipped with its Anticoagulant Bite, included in its cost. It cannot be equipped with any other weapons, armour, or equipment.

* **Anticoagulant Bite.** Melee, GAS

**Abilities**

* **Pet.** Select one GANGER model in your Warband at the start of the battle. The Arthromite Spinewyrm forms a FIRETEAM with that model. That model is its owner.

**Keywords**  
BEAST, DEEP STRIKE (TUNNEL), NO PROMOTION, STEALTH

### Gang: Corpsegrinder Cult

* **Chaos Cult.** Your Warband counts as a Chaos Warband instead of an Outlaw Warband, and generally recruits mercenaries as such, except you cannot recruit any Daemon, Heretic Astartes (besides Khorne Berzerker), Dark Mechanicum, or Skaven Mercenaries, but you can recruit Hive and Hive Beast Outlaw Mercenaries. Your patron can be a Gang Overlord or the Khorne Shared Patron.  
* **Blessed By The Lord Of Skin & Sinew.** As an Action with a Risky Success Roll, any of your models can attempt to invoke the dark gods. This Success Roll is made at \+1 DICE if the model has taken an enemy Out of Action during this battle, or \+2 DICE if it has taken an enemy ELITE Out of Action during the battle. Juves roll at an additional \-1 DICE. On a success, remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from the model and it gains \+1 DICE to Hit and to Injure with all melee attacks during this Activation. On a failed roll, it must roll on the Injury chart.  
* **Leader.** Your Gang Leader is known as a Butcher, and gains the following abilities:  
  * **First to the Frey.** When the Butcher charges, roll 2D6 instead of 1D6 and then add the highest of the two dice to their charge move.  
* **Champions.** You can recruit up to 3 Champions. They are known as either Cutters or Rippers, gaining the corresponding ability below:  
  * **Cutter: Dervish.** The Cutter ignores penalties for attacking with off-hand weapons.  
  * **Ripper: Powerful.** The Ripper gains the STRONG Keyword.  
* **Gangers.** Your Gangers are known as Skinners. When promoted to Elite, the Ganger gains the Cutter or Ripper ability listed for Champions above.  
* **Juves.** Your Juves are known as Initiates. Up to three of them can be upgraded to Fresh Meat for a cost of \+5 credits each. If they are upgraded to a Ganger later, they retain this upgrade, including its cost and limits.  
  * **Fresh Meat:** **Delicious.** When the Fresh Meat is taken Out of Action, one of your GANGER models of your choice gains a BLESSING MARKER.

#### Corpsegrinder Cult Unique Battlekit

* **Frightening Mask.** The model wearing this mask gains the FEAR Keyword.  
* **Rotary Flensing Saw.** \+1 INJURY DICE, CRITICAL, HEAVY, RISKY, TWO-HANDED  
  * Slash: Melee  
  * Whirl: 4”, ASSAULT, uses Melee skill to Hit but is still a ranged attack  
* **Terrifying Mask.** The model wearing this mask gains the FEAR Keyword, and while it is on the battlefield, enemy Warbands have \-1 DICE to Morale Tests.

### Gang: Delegation

* **Delegates.** Choose any one Alliance from the Necromunda Gang Campaign Shop besides Imperial House Alliance, Iron Guild Alliance, or Narco Lords Alliance. You have the benefits of that Alliance. You recruit the Delegation for that Alliance, but those models cost credits instead of Glory, as described below, and you must pay for them normally. They come with no equipment, but you can purchase equipment for them normally, and they can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Delegation Armoury or the Necromunda Gang Shared Armoury.  
    
  You cannot purchase any Alliances from the Campaign Shop.  
    
  Your Gang Leader is replaced as the leader of your Warband with a model that depends on your Delegation. That model gains the LEADER Keyword. Your choice also determines if your Warband counts as an Outlaw Warband or an Imperium Warband.  
  * **Cold Traders Alliance.** Cold Trader (leader, 70 credits), Bosun (30 credits), two Void-Born Scum (20 credits each, limited to Juve battlekit). Outlaw Warband.  
  * **Fallen Houses Alliance.** Rebel Lord (leader, 55 credits). Outlaw Warband.  
  * **House Catallus Alliance.** Masked Killer (leader, 65 credits), Mindfrayed (45 credits, cannot equip ranged weapons). Imperium or Outlaw Warband.  
  * **House Greim Alliance.** Krieg Mester (leader, 55 credits), Jagerkin (45 credits). Imperium or Outlaw Warband.  
  * **House Ko’iron.** Prima Materis (leader 50 credits), two Frateris Bodyguards (40 credits each). Imperium or Outlaw Warband.  
  * **House Ran Lo Alliance.** Auditor (leader, 60 credits), Gelt-Scrivener (45 credits). Imperium or Outlaw Warband.  
  * **House Ty Alliance.** Onmyoto Telepath (leader, 70 credits, cannot equip any non-PSYCHIC ranged weapons), Onmoyota Null (65 credits). Imperium or Outlaw Warband.  
  * **House Ulanti Alliance.** Courtier (leader, 70 credits), Mirror Mask (60 credits, must be equipped identically to the Courtier, ignoring all restrictions and limits, but not costs). Imperium or Outlaw Warband.  
  * **Imperial Imposters Alliance.** Master Charlatan (leader, 65 credits). Outlaw Warband.  
  * **Mercator Gelt: The Guild of Coin Alliance.** Master of Coin (leader, 35 credits), Skinflint (30 credits, must be equipped with a Cult Icon), two Grovellers (20 credits each, limited to Juve battlekit). Imperium Warband.  
  * **Mercator Nautica: The Water Guild Alliance.** Master Nautican (leader, 50 credits), Syphonite (30 credits, must be equipped with a Cult Icon), Subnautican (35 credits, must be equipped with Power Armour, always equipped with Heavy Fists for free, cannot be equipped with ranged weapons). Imperium Warband.  
  * **Mercator Pallidus: The Corpse Guild Alliance.** Pale Consort (leader, 60 credits), Bone Scrivener (40 credits, must be equipped with a Cult Icon), two Corpse Grinder (25 credits, cannot be equipped with ranged weapons). Imperium Warband.  
  * **Mercator Pyros: The Promethium Guild Alliance.** Pyrocaen Lord (leader, 45 credits), Pyromagir (30 credits, must be equipped with a Flamer that does not count towards your LIMIT and a Cult Icon, and they count as having an additional ranged hand), two Cynders (20 credits each, limited to Juve battlekit). Imperium Warband.  
  * **Mercator Sanguis: The Slave Guild Alliance.** Chain Lord (leader, 30 credits), Shackleman (30 credits, must be equipped with a Harpoon Gun and a Cult Icon, and count as having an additional ranged hand), two Pit Fighters (25 credits, cannot be equipped with ranged weapons). Imperium Warband.  
  * **Psi-Syndica Alliance.** Mind-Locked Wyrd (leader, 55 credits, can purchase up to five powers from the provided list, including after recruitment, paying normally, and must purchase at least two). Outlaw Warband.  
  * **Rogue Factoria Alliance.** Factoria Overseer (leader, 45 credits), Work Party Boss (40 credits), three Factoria Workers (20 credits each, limited to Juve battlekit). Outlaw Warband.  
* **Champions.** Your Champions function normally, but cost 5 fewer credits.  
* **Gangers.** Your Gangers function normally.  
* **Juves.** Your Juves function normally.

#### Delegation Unique Battlekit

* **Digital Laser.** 6”, PISTOL, \-1 INJURY DICE, takes no hands, can be used in addition to any other attacks the equipped model makes, but can be used only once per battle.  
* **Digital Laser Array.** 6”, PISTOL, \-1 INJURY DICE, takes no hands, can be used in addition to any other attacks the equipped model makes. Cannot be combined with a Digital Laser.  
* **Displacer Field.** Attacks against the equipped model have \-1 DICE to Hit. Cannot be combined with a Refractor Field.  
* **Gun Skull.** 12”, ASSAULT, takes no hands, can be used to make an additional attack when the wielder takes the Shoot Action.  
* **Refractor Field.** The equipped model treats Down results as Minor Hits (does not affect Down results that replace Out of Action via TOUGH Keyword). Cannot be combined with a Displacer Field.  
* **Shockwhip.** Melee, STUN, WHIP 3”  
* **Sling Gun.** 24”, ARMOUR PIERCING 1 on Critical Hit, TWO-HANDED

### Gang: Ironhead Squat Prospectors

* **Kin.** Your warband counts as a Xenos (Leagues of Votann) Warband, and your non-Mercenary GANGER models gain the VOTANN Keyword. It also counts as your choice of an Outlaw Warband or an Imperium Warband. Your patron cannot be a Gang Overlord, but it can be a Guildmaster, described in the Leagues of Votann Warband.  
* **Squats.** Your Gang Leader, Gang Champions, Ganger, and Juve models have \-1” to their movement speed, but the first \-1 of their Armour, if any, has IMPERVIOUS, and they cost 10 fewer credits.  
* **Leader.** Your Gang Leader is known as a Charter Master and gains the following ability:  
  * **Prospecting.** The Charter Master has the INFILTRATOR Keyword. At the start of each battle, you can give the INFILTRATOR Keyword to up to two other non-ELITE models in your Warband for that battle. They are deployed at the same time as your Charter Master, and must begin within 3” of your Charter Master.  
* **Champions.** Each of your Champions is a Drill Master and gain the following ability:  
  * **Heavy Drilling.** The Drill Master has the STRONG Keyword.  
* **Gangers.** Your Gangers are known as Drill-Kyn. When promoted to Elite, the Ganger gains the Heavy Drilling ability listed for Champions above.  
* **Juves.** You Juves are known as Diggers, and have \+0 Ranged Skill and \+0 Melee Skill, but cost 10 additional credits (for a total of \+0). Up to two of them can be upgraded to Burrowers for \+5 credits each. If a Burrower is later upgraded to a Ganger, it retains this upgrade, including its cost and limits.  
  * **Burrower:** **Drill Up.** The Burrower gains the DEEP STRIKE (TUNNEL) Keyword.  
* **Trikers.** You cannot purchase any Ridgerunners.

#### Ironhead Squat Prospectors Unique Battlekit

* **Svenotar Trike.** The equipped model is mounted on a trike. The rider gains the LARGE Keyword if it is not already LARGE, as well as the VEHICLE Keyword, and a movement speed of 8”/Infantry, but it has only one hand to carry other weapons, though it can hold two-handed weapons with Shield Combo. It also has the Built-In Weapon and Turbo-Boost abilities.  
  * **Built-In Weapon.** The rider can be equipped with up to 1 additional non-Grenade ranged weapon, which does not take any hands. The rider ignores the HEAVY Keyword of this weapon, and it can be used alongside any other ranged weapon when the rider takes the Shoot Action.  
  * **Turbo Boost.** The rider has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls, but it cannot climb sheer surfaces.  
* **Techmite Arc Welder.** Melee, \-1 INJURY DICE, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, RISKY  
* **Techmite Claw.** Melee, \-1 INJURY DICE  
* **Techmite Drill.** Melee, \-1 DICE  
* **Techmite Laser.** 18”, \-1 INJURY DICE  
* **Telescopic Sight.** Negates the penalty for Long Range if the model has not moved during this Activation. Works with any weapon.

#### 0-4 Techmite (Cost: 35 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Techmite | 5”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-1 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Techmite is equipped with light armour plating, included in its cost and statistics above. It can be equipped with Techmite Arc Welders, Techmite Claws, Techmite Drills, and Techmite Lasers, as well as up to one of the following equipment: Augury Scanner, Grapnel Launcher, Medicae Kit, or Vox Unit.

**Abilities**

* **Pet.** Select one GANGER model in your Warband at the start of the battle. The Techmite forms a FIRETEAM with that model. That model is its owner.

**Upgrades**

* **Anti-Grav Thrusters.** At a cost of \+10 credits, a Techmite’s movement can be improved to 6” and it gains FLYING.  
* **Ferramite Plating.** At a cost of \+20 credits, a Techmite’s armour can be improved to \-2, and the first \-1 of its Armour has IMPERVIOUS.

**Keywords**  
ARTIFICIAL, NO PROMOTION, NEGATE GAS

#### 0-2 Exo-Driller (Cost: 115 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Exo-Driller | 5”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-3 | 40mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Exo-Driller is equipped with heavy armour plating, included in its cost and statistics above. It can be equipped with any weapons or equipment from the Necromunda Gang Shared Armoury or the Ironhead Squat Prospectors Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Heavily Armoured.** The first \-1 of the Exo-Driller’s Armour has IMPERVIOUS.  
* **Sensor Suite.** The Exo-Driller ignores penalties to its attack Success Rolls besides Cover, Long Range, and BLOOD MARKERS (including INFECTION and STUN), as well as penalties or limits to the range of its ranged weapons.

**Keywords**  
LARGE, STRONG, TOUGH, VEHICLE

### Gang: Ratskins

* **Primitive.** Your patron must be a Sump Lord. You cannot purchase any Automatic Shotguns, Frag Grenades, Shock Batons, Shock Staves, Augury Scanners, Grav Chutes, Ridgerunners, any Cyberteknika Equipment, or any battlekit that costs Glory, from the Necromunda Gang Shared Armoury.  
* **Hive Attunement.** Your non-Mercenary GANGER models ignore the STEALTH Keyword, and the range of their attacks cannot be reduced.  
* **Tunnel Rats.** Your non-Mercenary GANGER models ignore Difficult Terrain, and have \+1 DICE to Success Rolls made to avoid falling or Dangerous Terrain.  
* **Leader.** Your Leader is known as a Chief and has the following additional ability:  
  * **Robust.** When the Chief rolls on the Elite Trauma table, you can roll twice and choose either result.  
* **Champions.** You can recruit up to 3 Champions. Your Champions are known as Hunters, Shamans, or Totem Warriors, gaining the corresponding ability below:  
  * **Hunter: Accurate.** The Hunter has an additional \+1 Ranged Skill (for a total of \+2).  
  * **Shaman (LIMIT: 1).** **Wyrd.** The Shaman gains PSYKER 1, can take up to four powers from the Spirit Lore Psychic Discipline, and must take at least one. It must be equipped with a PSYCHIC weapon in order to use any powers.  
  * **Totem Warrior: Force of Will.** The Totem Warrior treats Down results as Minor Hits (does not affect Down results that replace Out of Action via TOUGH Keyword).  
* **Gangers.** Your Gangers are known as Braves. Up to to of your Ganger can be upgraded to Shaman Adepts for free, as long as you have a Shaman in your Warband, granting them the following abilities:  
  * **Shamanistic Promotion.** If your Shaman is removed from your Warband for any reason, you can replace it with one of your Shaman Adepts. The new Shaman gains all of the rules and statistics of a Shaman, but is otherwise considered the same model.  
  * **Wyrd in Training.** A Shaman Adept gains PSYKER 0, must take exactly one power from the Spirit Lore Psychic Discipline, and must be equipped with a PSYCHIC weapon in order to use any powers.  
* **Juves.** Your Juves are known as Youngbloods.

#### Scavvies Armoury

##### Basic Ranged Weapons

Blunderbuss	5 credits

##### Special Ranged Weapons

Longbow		3 credits  
Slingshot		2 credits

##### Thrown Weapons

#### Ratskins Unique Battlekit

* **Barbed Arrows (CONSUMABLE).** AMMUNITION (SHRAPNEL). Longbow Only.  
* **Explosive Arrows (CONSUMABLE).** AMMUNITION (BLAST 2”, SHRAPNEL, \-1 INJURY DICE). Longbow Only.  
* **Good Luck Charm.** When the equipped model fails a Risky Success Roll, that model may use this item. If it does, its Activation is not ended. Can be used once per battle.  
* **Longbow.** 24”, RELOAD, TWO-HANDED  
* **Molotov Cocktails.** 6”, \-1 INJURY DICE, ASSAULT, FIRE, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE  
* **Poison Arrows (CONSUMABLE).** AMMUNITION (GAS). Longbow Only.  
* **Slingshot.** 12”, TWO-HANDED

#### Spirit Lore Psychic Discipline

1. **Spirit Provocation (10 credits, Effect).** 12”, Point, End of Turn, place a Spirit Marker on the battlefield at the target point. The area within 3” of the center of that marker counts as Dangerous and Difficult Terrain.  
2. **Curse (5 credits, Effect).** 18”, One Enemy, Target Activation, the target has \-1 DICE to all actions.  
3. **Ghost Dance (5 credits, Effect).** 12”, Self or One Ally, End of Turn, the target has \-1 INJURY MODIFIER, stacking with armour and shields up to \-3.  
4. **Blindnake Ritual (7 credits, Effect).** 18”, Self or One Ally, End of Turn, all attacks against the target have \-1 DICE to Hit.  
5. **Spirit Walk (10 credits, Effect).** 18”, Self and One Enemy, Immediate, remove the caster from the battlefield then place it on the battlefield anywhere within 1” of the target enemy. The caster has \+1 DICE to Hit with the next melee attack it makes against the target enemy during this Activation.  
6. **Steal Prowess (1 Glory, Effect).** 12”, One Enemy, End of Battle, randomly choose one Campaign Skill the target has. The target loses that skill and this model gains it. If that skill provides one or more Exploration skills, the effect lasts until the end of the Exploration Step.

#### 0-3 Ghost Warrior (Cost: 95 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Ghost Warrior | 7”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Ghost Warrior can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Ratskins Armoury or the Necromunda Gang Shared Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Hit and Run.** Enemy models never get free attacks against the Ghost Warrior when it Retreats, and the Ghost Warrior can move out of Melee Combat using its Standard Move, Charge, or Dash.  
* **Hive Spirit Ward.** All attacks made against the Ghost Warrior have \-1 DICE.  
* **Force of Will.** The Ghost Warrior treats Down results as Minor Hits (does not affect Down results that replace Out of Action via TOUGH Keyword).

**Keywords**  
GANGER, SKIRMISHER, STRONG

### Gang: Scavvies

* **Leader.** Your Leader is known as a Beggar King and costs 5 fewer credits.  
* **Champions.** Each of your Champions is a Scalie, and has the FEAR, LARGE, REGENERATION 1, and STRONG Keywords, as well as the following ability. They cost 40 additional credits.  
  * **Scales.** The Scalie has \-1 Armour, but cannot wear armour. It can still carry a Shield.  
* **Gangers.** Your Gangers are known as Scavvies and cost 5 fewer credits. Up to half of them, rounded up, can be upgraded to Mutants at a cost of \+5 credits (for a total of \+0 cost), granting them one of the following abilities at random:  
1. **Bloated.** The model gains the LARGE keyword and treats Down results as Minor Hits (does not affect Down results that replace Out of Action via TOUGH Keyword).  
2. **Camouflage.** The model gains the STEALTH Keyword.  
3. **Horns of the Beast.** When the Mutant successfully Charges one or more enemies, one of them gets a BLOOD MARKER.  
4. **Extra Legs.** The Mutant cannot be forced to move by any effect an enemy model causes.  
5. **Mutant Limb.** The Mutant gains the following weapon: Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, HELD  
6. **Extra Arm.** The Mutant gains an extra arm, which can carry melee and ranged weapons as normal. It can make an additional attack with any weapon in that arm without off-hand penalties. If it cannot normally be equipped, this hand can be equipped with weapons, a shield, or any battlekit that takes a single hand from the Chaos Cult Armoury.  
* **Juves.** Your Juves are known as Junk Divers and ignore Difficult and Dangerous Terrain.

#### 0-5 Plague Zombie (Cost: 30 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Poxwalker | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \+0 | 0 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Plague Zombie is equipped with its Swipe. It cannot be equipped with any other weapons, armour, or equipment.

* **Swipe.** Melee

**Abilities**

* **Dead Flesh.** Injury rolls made against the Plague Zombie have \-1 DICE unless they have the FIRE Keyword.  
* **Hungry.** At the start of each of its Activations, if there are any enemy models within 12” that the Plague Zombie can see, its first action must be to Charge the closest enemy.  
* **Shambling.** The Plague Zombie moves only half as far when Dashing and cannot benefit from Cover.  
* **Spreading Plague.** If this model takes an enemy Out of Action in melee, and that model is a casualty during the post-battle sequence, add another Plague Zombie to your Warband for free. You can exceed the normal limit of 5 Plague zombies in this way.

**Keywords**  
FEAR, GANGER, NEGATE GAS, NO PROMOTION, NURGLE

#### 0-3 Scavvy Hound (Cost: 40 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Scavvy Hound | 8”/Infantry | N/A | \+1 | 0 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Scavvy Hound is equipped with its Rabid Bite. It can be equipped with Standard Armour. It cannot be equipped with any other weapons, armour, or equipment.

* **Rabid Bite.** Melee, INFECTION MARKERS

**Abilities**

* **Canid Swiftness.** The Scavvy Hound has \+1 DICE to all Dash and Jump Success Rolls.  
* **Pet.** Select one other non-ARTIFICIAL, non-BEAST model in your Warband at the start of the battle. The Scavvy Hound forms a FIRETEAM with that model. That model is its owner (though it may outrank that model if it is not ELITE).

**Keywords**  
BEAST, FIRETEAM, GANGER, NO PROMOTION

#### 0-2 Ghoul (Cost: 45 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Ghoul | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \+1 | 0 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Ghoul is equipped with its Claws. It cannot be equipped with any other weapons, armour, or equipment.

* **Claws.** Melee, CLEAVE 2, CRITICAL

**Abilities**

* **Consume Flesh.** When an enemy is taken Out of Action within 1” of the Ghoul, you can remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from the Ghoul.  
* **Hungry.** At the start of each of its Activations, if there are any enemy models within 12” that the Ghoul can see, its first action must be to Charge the closest enemy.

**Keywords**  
FEAR, GANGER, LIMITED POTENTIAL, STEALTH

### Gang: Palanite Enforcers

* **Imperial Authority.** Your Warband counts as an Imperium Warband instead of an Outlaw Warband. Your patron must be the Administratum Prefectus Shared Patron.  
* **Ruthless Efficiency.** Your GANGER models do not roll to randomly select a target when making ranged attacks against enemies that are engaged in close combat, instead always targeting the chosen target.  
* **Leader.** Your Gang Leader is known as a Captain and gains the following ability:  
  * **Mark For Justice.** As an Action with no roll required, the Captain can choose one enemy it can see. Until the end of the current Turn, your GANGER models have VICIOUS 10 with all attacks against that enemy.  
* **Champions.** Each of your Champions is a Sergeant and gains the following ability:  
  * **Heavy Hitter.** The Sergeant has an additional \+1 to its Melee skill (normally for a total of \+2).  
* **Gangers.** Your Gangers are known as Patrolmen. When promoted to Elite, the Ganger gains the Heavy Hitter ability listed for Champions above.  
* **Juves.** You Juves are known as Rookies. Up to two of them can be upgraded to Haunts for \+5 credits each, and up to two of them can be upgraded to Hotshots for \+5 credits each. If a Hotshot is later upgraded to a Ganger, it retains this upgrade, including its cost and limits.  
  * **Haunt:** **Sanctioned Psyker.** Gains the PSYKER 1 and NO PROMOTION Keywords, and loses the New Kid ability. Select either the Telepathy or Telekinesis Shared Psychic Discipline. The Haunt may purchase up to three powers from that Discipline, and must purchase at least one. It must be equipped with exactly one PSYCHIC Weapon.  
  * **Hotshot:** **Headstrong.** When the Hotshot charges, roll 2D6 instead of 1D6 and then add the highest of the two dice to their charge move.

#### Palanite Enforcers Unique Battlekit

* **Concussion Carbine.** 18”, ASSAULT, RISKY. If the wielder hits a target with this weapon that is not LARGE, the model hit is moved in a straight line D3” directly away from the wielder.  
* **Magnacles.** Enemy models in close combat with this model cannot stand up from being Down.  
* **Nuncio Aquila.** The model gains the FEAR keyword.  
* **Photon Flash Grenades.** 8”, ASSAULT, BLAST 3”, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE, STUN, THROWN, can be used in melee using Ranged skill, in place of using melee weapons. Causes no injury, but does cause a STUN MARKER as an attack that uses the STUN Keyword. Instead, on a hit, the target cannot make attacks against enemies that Retreat from it until the end of the current Turn.

#### 0-2 Hardcase Cyber Mastiff (Cost: 95 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Hardcase Cyber Mastiff | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \+1 | \-2 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Hardcase Cyber Mastiff is equipped with its Savage Bite, included in its cost. It cannot be equipped with any other weapons, armour, or equipment.

* **Savage Bite.** Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 1

**Abilities**

* **Cyber Swiftness.** The Hardcase Cyber Mastiff has \+1 DICE to all Dash and Jump Success Rolls  
* **Loyal Protector.** Enemies in melee with the Hardcase Cyber Mastiff cannot attack its owner.  
* **Pet.** Select one GANGER model in your Warband at the start of the battle. The Hardcase Cyber Mastiff forms a FIRETEAM with that model. That model is its owner.  
* **Watchdog.** If the Hardcase Cyber Mastiff and its owner are both legal targets for an enemy’s Charge action, the enemy cannot choose the owner.

**Keywords**  
ARTIFICIAL, NO PROMOTION

#### 0-2 Sanctioner Automata (Cost: 135 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Sanctioner Automata | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-2 | 40mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Sanctioner Automata is equipped with heavy armour plating and a Pacifier Assault Claw, which takes up one of its hands in melee, included in its cost and its statistics above. It can be equipped with any other weapons from the Necromunda Gang Shared Armour or the Palatine Enforcers Armoury. It cannot be equipped with any other armour or equipment.

* **Pacifier Assault Claw.** Melee, CRITICAL

**Abilities**

* **Mobile Bulwark.** Friendly models that are not LARGE, can treat this model as Cover. It is always considered large enough terrain to provide this Cover.

**Keywords**  
ARTIFICIAL, LARGE, NEGATE GAS, NEGATE SHRAPNEL, NO PROMOTION, REGENERATE 1, STRONG, TOUGH

Gang: Scummers

* **Scum.** Your patron must be a Sump Lord.  
* **All Kinds.** When you recruit a Gang Leader, Champion, Ganger, or Juve, choose another Gang besides Corpsegrinder Cult,  Delegation, or Slave Ogryn. That model has the special rules of the chosen Gang, besides any that affects your Warband’s type (Outlaw) or patron. Any rules from that Gang that apply to your whole Warband, all of your models, or to all of your GANGERS apply only to models you have chosen from that Gang. A model can be equipped from the chosen Gang’s Armoury when you recruit it, but you cannot purchase any more battlekit for it from that Armoury after it is recruited. If a piece of battlekit appears in multiple Armouries, you must obey the highest LIMIT among factions whose models you have recruited. The following additional rules apply, depending on the Gang:  
  * **House Cawdor.** You only gain a Miracle via Hold if you chose the House Cawdor Gang for your Warband leader.  
  * **Venators.** You do not choose a Hunting Style and cannot purchase any Hunting Rigs.  
* **Scraped Together.** You can recruit only up to 1 Champion.

### Gang: Slave Ogryn

* **Ogryn.** Your Gang Leader, Champions, and Gangers each gain the LARGE, STRONG, and TOUGH Keywords.  
* **Leader.** Your Gang Leader is known as an Overboss and costs 5 additional credits.  
* **Champions.** Your Champions are known as Underbosses and cost 25 additional credits.  
* **Gangers.** Your Gangers cost 25 additional credits and have the LIMITED POTENTIAL Keyword, and gain the following Ability:  
  * **Loyal.** Other allies have \+1 DICE to Hit with melee attacks against any enemy the Ganger is within 1” of. This bonus does not stack.

  Up to half of your Gangers, rounded up, can be upgraded to Lobo-Slaves at no additional cost, granting them the NEGATE FEAR Keyword. Loboslaves also have the NO PROMOTION Keyword.

* **Juves.** You cannot recruit any Juves.

Power Armour       	40 credits (Elite Only)

### Gang: Venators

* **Hunter Style.** Choose one of the following:  
  * **Arsenal.** Reduce the price of all weapons with a cost of 15 credits or more by 5 credits. Reduce the cost of all other weapons by 2 credits, to a minimum of 1\. You cannot purchase any Hunting Rigs.  
  * **Spyre Hunters.** Your Warband counts as an Imperium Warband, and you can purchase Hunting Rigs. Each of your GANGER models must be equipped with a Hunting Rig. Your patron must be a Wealthy Noble.  
* **Bounties.** Whenever one of your models takes an enemy ELITE model Out of Action, you gain D6x5 credits.  
* **Leader.** Your Gang Leader is known as a Hunt Leader. Optionally, you can replace its Around the Block ability with the following:  
  * **Psyker.** The Hunt Leader gains the PSYKER 1 Keyword. Select one Shared Psychic Discipline. The Hunt Leader may purchase up to three powers from that Discipline, and must purchase at least one. It must be wielding a PSYCHIC weapon to use any psychic powers.  
* **Champions.** Each of your Champions is a Hunt Champion, but retains the same statistics.  
* **Gangers.** Your Gangers are known as Hunters, but retain the same statistics.  
* **Juves.** You cannot recruit any Juves.

#### Venators Unique Battlekit

* **Disintegration Matrix.** 12”, ARMOUR PIERCING 2  
* **Heavy Hunting Rig.** \-3 INJURY MODIFIER, but does not stack with a Shield. The model gains the LARGE and VEHICLE Keywords.  
* **Hunting Rig.** \-2 INJURY MODIFIER. The model gains the VEHICLE Keyword.  
* **Laser Gauntlet.** 12”, ASSAULT, takes up no hands.  
* **Mirror Shield.** Counts as a Shield, including for Shield Combo, \-1 INJURY MODIFIER, and has the following weapon built in:  
  * Melee. Causes no injury. On a hit, the target cannot make attacks against enemies that Retreat from it until the end of the current Turn.  
* **Monomolecular Sword.** Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 2  
* **Naga Blade.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, CRITICAL  
* **Sthenian Hunting Rig.** \-3 INJURY MODIFIER, but does not stack with a Shield. The model gains the LARGE and VEHICLE Keywords. This armour has the following weapon built in:  
  * **Sthenian Claws.** Melee, CRITICAL. Takes no hands and can be used to make an extra attack when the wielder takes the Fight Action.  
* **Yeld Hunting Rig.** \-2 INJURY MODIFIER. The model gains 8” movement and the FLYING, INFILTRATOR, STEALTH, and VEHICLE Keywords.

#### 0-1 Caryatid Prime (Cost: 35 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Caryatid Prime | 8”/Flying | N/A | \-1 | 0 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Caryatid Prime cannot be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment. It is always considered to be equipped with a Close Combat Weapon.

**Abilities**

* **Precognition (Psychic).** All attacks against the Caryatid Prime, and its owner if the Caryatid Prime is within 6” of it, are made at \-1 DICE to Hit.  
* **Pet.** Select one GANGER model in your Warband at the start of the battle. The Caryatid Prime forms a FIRETEAM with that model. That model is its owner.

**Keywords**  
BEAST, FLYING, NO PROMOTION
